Package calendar.controller.parser

Class CreateEventParams.Builder

  • java.lang.Object
    • calendar.controller.parser.CreateEventParams.Builder
  • Enclosing class:
    CreateEventParams
    public static class CreateEventParams.Builder
extends java.lang.Object
    Builder for CreateEventParams. Provides a fluent API for constructing event parameters with optional recurrence fields.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      Builder​(java.lang.String subject, java.time.LocalDateTime start, java.time.LocalDateTime end)
      Creates a builder with required fields.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      CreateEventParams build()
      Builds the CreateEventParams instance.
      CreateEventParams.Builder repeatCount​(java.lang.Integer count)
      Sets the repeat count for recurring events.
      CreateEventParams.Builder repeatUntil​(java.time.LocalDateTime until)
      Sets the repeat until date for recurring events.
      CreateEventParams.Builder withRecurrence​(Weekday[] days)
      Sets the recurrence days for a recurring event.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • Builder

        public Builder​(java.lang.String subject,
               java.time.LocalDateTime start,
               java.time.LocalDateTime end)
        Creates a builder with required fields.
        Parameters:
        subject - the event subject (required, non-null)
        start - the start date-time (required, non-null)
        end - the end date-time (required, non-null)
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if any required field is null or invalid

    • Method Detail

      • withRecurrence

        public CreateEventParams.Builder withRecurrence​(Weekday[] days)
        Sets the recurrence days for a recurring event.
        Parameters:
        days - the days of the week to repeat on (required for recurring events)
        Returns:
        this builder

      • repeatCount

        public CreateEventParams.Builder repeatCount​(java.lang.Integer count)
        Sets the repeat count for recurring events. Mutually exclusive with repeatUntil.
        Parameters:
        count - the number of occurrences (must be positive)
        Returns:
        this builder

      • repeatUntil

        public CreateEventParams.Builder repeatUntil​(java.time.LocalDateTime until)
        Sets the repeat until date for recurring events. Mutually exclusive with repeatCount.
        Parameters:
        until - the end date for the series (must be after start date)
        Returns:
        this builder

      • build

        public CreateEventParams build()
        Builds the CreateEventParams instance.
        Returns:
        a new CreateEventParams instance
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if validation fails
